name: MANASI PANT
education: Master of International Affairs in Economic Development and Data Analysis — Columbia University
bio:
Hi! I'm Manasi — a researcher, consultant, and creative wanderer based in New York. My work sits at the intersection of data, storytelling, and international development. I'm passionate about turning complex problems into clear narratives and finding the humanity in the numbers.

When I'm not deep in policy briefs or datasets, you'll find me documenting communities through photography, editing short films, or hunting for the best mushroom risotto in whatever city I'm visiting.
